auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Runpod API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in Runpod Console API Keys.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Runpod Pod lifecycle request.

podId.description: The Pod ID targeted by the lifecycle request.

action.description: The lifecycle operation that was requested.

success.description: Whether the lifecycle request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after requesting to delete a Runpod Pod.

actions.name: get_pod
actions.description: Get one Runpod Pod by ID.

includeMachine.description: Whether to include machine details for each returned Pod.

includeNetworkVolume.description: Whether to include attached network volume details for each returned Pod.

includeSavingsPlans.description: Whether to include savings plan details applied to each returned Pod.

includeTemplate.description: Whether to include template details for each returned Pod.

includeWorkers.description: Whether to include Pods that are serving as Serverless workers.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one Runpod Pod.

desiredStatus.description: The desired Pod status such as RUNNING, EXITED, or TERMINATED.

image.description: The image tag used by the Pod.

endpointId.description: The attached Serverless endpoint ID when present.

templateId.description: The template ID used to create the Pod.

publicIp.description: The Pod public IPv4 address when available.

costPerHr.description: The Pod hourly cost before savings plans.

adjustedCostPerHr.description: The Pod hourly cost after active savings plans are applied.

interruptible.description: Whether the Pod is interruptible rather than reserved.

locked.description: Whether the Pod is locked against stop or reset.

lastStartedAt.description: The UTC timestamp when the Pod was last started.

lastStatusChange.description: The last Pod lifecycle status message.

cpuFlavorId.description: The Runpod CPU flavor ID for CPU Pods.

vcpuCount.description: The number of vCPUs assigned to the Pod.

memoryInGb.description: The amount of memory assigned to the Pod in GB.

containerDiskInGb.description: The container disk size assigned to the Pod in GB.

volumeInGb.description: The Pod volume size assigned in GB.

volumeMountPath.description: The filesystem mount path for the Pod or attached network volume.

portMappings.description: A map from internal Pod ports to public ports.

env.description: The environment variables configured on the Pod.

gpu.description: The GPU summary for the Pod when present.

machine.description: Machine details for the Pod when included.

networkVolume.description: The attached network volume when includeNetworkVolume is enabled.

savingsPlans.description: Savings plans applied to the Pod when includeSavingsPlans is enabled.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching one Runpod Pod.

actions.name: list_pods
actions.description: List Runpod Pods with optional official filter parameters.

computeType.description: Filter to GPU Pods or CPU Pods only.

items.description: One Runpod CPU flavor ID such as cpu3c.

cpuFlavorId.description: Filter to CPU Pods with any of the provided Runpod CPU flavor IDs.

items.description: One Runpod data center ID such as EU-RO-1.

dataCenterId.description: Filter to Pods located in any of the provided Runpod data centers.

desiredStatus.description: Filter to Pods in the provided desired status.

endpointId.description: Filter to Pods attached to the provided Runpod Serverless endpoint.

items.description: One Runpod GPU type ID such as NVIDIA RTX A5000.

gpuTypeId.description: Filter to GPU Pods with any of the provided Runpod GPU type IDs.

id.description: Filter to a specific Pod by ID.

imageName.description: Filter to Pods created from the provided image name.

includeMachine.description: Whether to include machine details for each returned Pod.

includeNetworkVolume.description: Whether to include attached network volume details for each returned Pod.

includeSavingsPlans.description: Whether to include savings plan details applied to each returned Pod.

includeTemplate.description: Whether to include template details for each returned Pod.

includeWorkers.description: Whether to include Pods that are serving as Serverless workers.

name.description: Filter to Pods with the provided name.

networkVolumeId.description: Filter to Pods with the provided attached network volume ID.

templateId.description: Filter to Pods created from the provided template ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Runpod Pods.

desiredStatus.description: The desired Pod status such as RUNNING, EXITED, or TERMINATED.

image.description: The image tag used by the Pod.

endpointId.description: The attached Serverless endpoint ID when present.

templateId.description: The template ID used to create the Pod.

publicIp.description: The Pod public IPv4 address when available.

costPerHr.description: The Pod hourly cost before savings plans.

adjustedCostPerHr.description: The Pod hourly cost after active savings plans are applied.

interruptible.description: Whether the Pod is interruptible rather than reserved.

locked.description: Whether the Pod is locked against stop or reset.

lastStartedAt.description: The UTC timestamp when the Pod was last started.

lastStatusChange.description: The last Pod lifecycle status message.

cpuFlavorId.description: The Runpod CPU flavor ID for CPU Pods.

vcpuCount.description: The number of vCPUs assigned to the Pod.

memoryInGb.description: The amount of memory assigned to the Pod in GB.

containerDiskInGb.description: The container disk size assigned to the Pod in GB.

volumeInGb.description: The Pod volume size assigned in GB.

volumeMountPath.description: The filesystem mount path for the Pod or attached network volume.

portMappings.description: A map from internal Pod ports to public ports.

env.description: The environment variables configured on the Pod.

gpu.description: The GPU summary for the Pod when present.

machine.description: Machine details for the Pod when included.

networkVolume.description: The attached network volume when includeNetworkVolume is enabled.

savingsPlans.description: Savings plans applied to the Pod when includeSavingsPlans is enabled.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Runpod Pods.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Runpod Pod lifecycle request.

podId.description: The Pod ID targeted by the lifecycle request.

action.description: The lifecycle operation that was requested.

success.description: Whether the lifecycle request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after requesting to reset a Runpod Pod.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Runpod Pod lifecycle request.

podId.description: The Pod ID targeted by the lifecycle request.

action.description: The lifecycle operation that was requested.

success.description: Whether the lifecycle request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after requesting to restart a Runpod Pod.

actions.name: start_pod
actions.description: Start or resume a Runpod Pod.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Runpod Pod lifecycle request.

podId.description: The Pod ID targeted by the lifecycle request.

action.description: The lifecycle operation that was requested.

success.description: Whether the lifecycle request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after requesting to start a Runpod Pod.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Runpod Pod lifecycle request.

podId.description: The Pod ID targeted by the lifecycle request.

action.description: The lifecycle operation that was requested.

success.description: Whether the lifecycle request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after requesting to stop a Runpod Pod.
